affected_users: Screen-reader users; users needing text alternatives
reproduction_steps: Open homepage listings or listing detail page and inspect rendered property images in cards/gallery
evidence: Rendered homepage and listing-detail images include multiple empty alt values (`alt=\\"`) for property photos while those photos are substantive content"
legal_risk_note: Barrier sits on the core property-discovery journey for a realtor site
recommended_fix: Require meaningful alt text for listing media or generate structured fallback alt text from listing/address metadata when attachment alt is blank

component: Homepage video cards and injected YouTube iframe
reproduction_steps: Tab to first homepage video card, activate with Enter, inspect resulting embed and focus state
evidence: Keyboard activation injects a YouTube iframe with no title; focus remains on the replaced `.dmg-video-card` wrapper
legal_risk_note: Homepage marketing video is a public-facing conversion surface and should not require vision or mouse-only interaction
recommended_fix: Use a native button, set iframe title from video title, and move or preserve focus predictably after activation

affected_users: Low-vision users; mobile users in low-clarity conditions
reproduction_steps: Run axe-core or inspect labels in listing photo toolbar and details bar
evidence: axe-core reported six color-contrast failures including `View`, `Size`, `Price`, `Beds`, `Baths`, and `Sq Ft` labels against `#FAFAFA` backgrounds
legal_risk_note: Barrier affects readability on the main listing-detail template
recommended_fix: Darken label colors to meet at least 4.5:1 at current size/weight

evidence: axe-core reports `aria-prohibited-attr` for `<div class=\dmg-testimonial-stars...\" aria-label=\"5 out of 5 stars\">`"
legal_risk_note: Not the highest-value user task, but it is a confirmed semantic defect on the public homepage
recommended_fix: Replace the ARIA pattern with valid semantic text or hidden text tied to the icon group

affected_users: Screen-reader users; keyboard users navigating by headings
reproduction_steps: Open any listing detail page and inspect heading structure
evidence: Rendered listing page shows title and h2s but no h1; hero address is output as a paragraph instead
legal_risk_note: Weakens orientation on the core transaction template
recommended_fix: Render the property address as the page h1

affected_users: Users with cognitive disabilities; users with motor impairments; autofill-dependent users
reproduction_steps: Inspect rendered form input markup on contact and listing detail pages
evidence: Rendered fields are labeled and required, but no `autocomplete` tokens are present for name, email, or telephone fields
legal_risk_note: Does not usually block all access, but it is below AA expectations for modern public forms
recommended_fix: Add appropriate autocomplete tokens such as `name`, `email`, and `tel`

affected_users: Users with cognitive disabilities; users with motor impairments
reproduction_steps: Review form handler and server-side failure path
evidence: Shared handler redirects with only `dmg_contact_error=required`; field values are not preserved across redirect and error output is generic rather than field-specific
legal_risk_note: Supportable access issue on a public lead form, especially if browser-side validation is bypassed or server-side save/mail fails
recommended_fix: Preserve values across redirects and attach field-level error text via inline messaging and `aria-describedby`
